description_long: This is a large, sleek, modern military-style airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are swept back with a slight anhedral angle, giving it an aggressive, aerodynamic profile. Twin engines are mounted under the wings near the fuselage, and the tail features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer configuration. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage and is covered by a tinted canopy. The overall surface is smooth and metallic, with a primarily gray color scheme and subtle gold accents on the cockpit area. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable and currently stowed.
description: A large, gray, swept-wing airplane with twin engines, a pointed nose, and a twin-tail design. The cockpit is forward-mounted with a gold-tinted canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, swept-back wings with a slight downward angle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and the underwing engine placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the streamlined body and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with a slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single gold-tinted canopy.
